title: asyncio.get_event_loop() used inside running async context
description: LLMs frequently emit asyncio.get_event_loop() inside async functions. In Python 3.10+ this emits DeprecationWarning and in 3.12+ raises RuntimeError when there is no current event loop. The correct call inside a running coroutine is asyncio.get_running_loop().
hallucination_signal: LLM trained on pre-3.10 code will confidently emit get_event_loop() as the canonical async loop accessor. The deprecation is invisible to models that haven't been updated on Python 3.12 changelog data.

detection_rule.message: Use asyncio.get_running_loop() inside coroutines; get_event_loop() is deprecated in 3.10+ and broken in 3.12+
